description: Enhance the visibility of dark features by applying a square root transformation (gamma=0.5) to the Green, Red, and NIR bands of the Landsat image located at ~/snap_data/landsat_multispectral.tif. Create a new product containing exactly and only these three enhanced bands. Save the resulting product in BEAM-DIMAP format to ~/snap_exports/enhanced_coastal.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to ~/snap_exports/enhanced_coastal.tif.
